title: Pushti
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Pushti''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. It was present during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It also was a part of the ''[[Liberty/Legends|Liberty]]''{{'s}} task force at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] prior to the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
